title: Delivery Pre-flight Findings
description: Structured research output that becomes runtime assertions at /curdx:ship time. Every blocker-level finding MUST include a preflight_cmd; advisory findings only need a source URL.

research_budget_used.description: Track how much of the 5-query budget was consumed. Surfaced by /curdx:status.

id.description: F1, F2, ... stable within a feature

kind.description: version = lib >= X; api = endpoint shape; env = env var required; lockfile = dep must resolve; config = file must have key; compat = platform/runtime constraint

subject.description: What the finding is about — library name, env var name, API endpoint, etc.

assertion.description: The human-readable condition that must be true at ship time.

source.description: URL or file path backing the assertion. Required for advisory findings.

reason.description: Why this matters — what breaks if the assertion fails.

severity.description: blocker = /curdx:ship refuses to push if preflight_cmd fails. advisory = surfaces warning, does not block.

preflight_cmd.description: Shell one-liner that exits 0 when assertion holds, non-zero otherwise. REQUIRED for blocker severity. Must be deterministic and offline when possible.

findings.subject: next
findings.reason: App Router breaking change in 14.1 — older lockfile will crash at build time.

findings.subject: DATABASE_URL
findings.assertion: DATABASE_URL is set in the ship-time environment
findings.reason: Postgres client fails fast if URL is missing; runtime crash on first request.

findings.subject: Stripe webhook signature
findings.reason: Older API versions silently drop fields the code expects.
